description: Referendum on Berlusconi's devolution reform (premierato + devolution + reduced Senate). NO won 61.3% with turnout 52.5%. Tests one-sided momentum when the reform's political sponsor loses power mid-campaign.

key_events.description: Constitutional law professors publish open letter against reform.
Lega Nord and Forza Italia split on reform messaging. SI coalition fragmented.
Prodi wins general election April 9-10. Berlusconi loses power, fatally weakening SI campaign.
New Prodi government inaugurated, actively campaigns for NO.
FIFA World Cup begins in Germany. Reduced public attention on referendum.

calibration_notes: Tests one-sided momentum where the change option steadily loses ground. Key: government change mid-campaign (Berlusconi losing election fatally wounded SI), elite consensus against reform, orphaned reform pattern, fragmented pro-reform coalition. Final margin larger than polls predicted (shy NO voters).
